description: Explore existing shared schema/type patterns for adding RuleTestIndex without bloating agents.meta.json.
focus: packages/shared schemas types zod exports agents-meta RuleTestIndex .fabric/rule-test.index.json
findings: RuleTestIndex should be a new shared sidecar schema, not an agents.meta.json extension. Add packages/shared/src/schemas/rule-test-index.ts with Zod schemas/types and export from shared index. V1 fields should model generated static mapping: schema_version, generated_at, links, orphan_annotations, rule_hash, test_hash, previous_rule_hash, previous_test_hash.

description: Explore sync-meta implementation and tests to identify where to scan @fabric-verify annotations, compute test hashes, preserve previous hashes, and write/check the sidecar index.
focus: packages/cli sync-meta computeAgentsMeta check-only hash previous_rule_hash previous_test_hash @fabric-verify tests
findings: sync-meta currently computes/writes only agents.meta.json and check-only compares stableStringify(existingMeta) vs computedMeta. V1 sidecar should be computeRuleTestIndex(target, computedMeta, previousIndex?) and check-only must compare both meta and index. Preserve previous hashes by prior entry key stable_id+test_file+line. No existing @fabric-verify support.

description: Explore doctor report/service/CLI patterns to add a static Rule-test contracts check for covered, stale_rule, stale_test, orphan, and missing states.
focus: packages/server doctor DoctorCheck runDoctorReport meta drift status warn error rule-test contracts
findings: Doctor integration point is packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts: runDoctorReport collects snapshots then create*Check reduces status. Add inspectRuleTestContracts(projectRoot) reading .fabric/rule-test.index.json + readAgentsMeta, then createRuleTestContractsCheck. CLI rendering can stay generic. Tests fit existing doctor.test.ts fixture style.

description: Explore existing Vitest/doc patterns for sync-meta, doctor, shared schema, and docs updates so V1 is covered and documented as static traceability only.
focus: __tests__ vitest docs CONVENTIONS SPEC_INTERNAL RULE_REGISTRY V1 limitations no Jest runner no pass evidence
findings: Existing coverage pattern: shared Zod schema tests in packages/shared/test/agents-meta.test.ts; sync-meta fixture tests in packages/cli/__tests__/sync-meta.test.ts; static doctor states in packages/server/src/services/doctor.test.ts. Docs should update SPEC_INTERNAL, CONVENTIONS, and RULE_REGISTRY to frame .fabric/rule-test.index.json as static declared coverage only.
